detectors.description:
TokenERC20.transferFrom(address,address,uint256).to (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#225) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = to (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#227)

TokenERC20.transfernewun(address)._newun (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#181) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = _newun (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#183)
solc-0.5.17 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.
detectors.markdown: solc-0.5.17 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint >=0.5.17 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- MissingEscapingInFormatting
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow.
It is used by:
	- >=0.5.17 (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#13)

detectors.description: Parameter TokenERC20.transfernewun(address)._newun (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#181) is not in mixedCase

TokenERC20.constructor() (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#165-179) uses literals with too many digits:
	- _totalSupply = 1000000000000000000000000 (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#173)

detectors.description:
receiveApproval(address,uint256,address,bytes) should be declared external:
	- ApproveAndCallFallBack.receiveApproval(address,uint256,address,bytes) (SpaceXStarlinK.sol#83)
Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
data location should be calldata
